These results demonstrate that interlayer electronic coupling can be used as an efficient means to redirect exciton populations toward radiative channels, enhancing emission efficiency in two-dimensional semiconductors without chemical modification or strain.

AI.tldr: 本文报道了在MoSe₂/PdSe₂范德华异质结中通过层间电子耦合实现室温A激子发光~6倍增强（量子产率从~1%提升至6%），同时抑制B激子和非辐射复合，为无需化学修饰或应变的二维半导体发光增强提供了新策略。
AI.motivation: 原子级薄半导体中激子辐射复合与非辐射复合的竞争决定发光效率，现有方法（缺陷钝化、化学掺杂、介电工程、应变调控）主要侧重于抑制非辐射损失，作者希望探索一种不依赖化学修饰或应变的发光增强新机制。
AI.method: 构建MoSe₂/PdSe₂ II型范德华异质结，通过层间电子耦合重新分配激子布居，将激子从非辐射通道导向辐射性A激子通道；采用功率依赖、温度依赖及光致发光激发光谱等手段表征激子动力学。
AI.result: 室温下A激子发光增强约6倍，光致发光量子产率达6%（单层MoSe₂仅约1%）；B激子被强烈猝灭；激子-激子湮灭被抑制；低温下转为猝灭发光；在450-725 nm宽波段内均有增强，非共振特异性机制。
AI.conclusion: 层间电子耦合可作为一种有效手段，在不引入化学修饰或应变的情况下，将激子重新导向辐射通道，从而提升二维半导体的发光效率。

title: Lieb-Schultz-Mattis theorem from gauge constraints
comment: 7 pages, 2 figures + Supplemental material (6 pages, 1 figure)
summary: We construct a $\mathbb{Z}_2 \times \mathbb{Z}_2$ gauge theory coupled to matter on a one-dimensional chain, aiming to study the ground-state physics in the Gauss law subspace. We show that the theory in the Gauss law subspace has a U$(1)$ symmetry whose generator commutes with lattice translations, but anticommutes with the lattice reflection operator. This leads to a Lieb-Schultz-Mattis (LSM) theorem that always rules out a trivial gapped ground state in the Gauss law subspace, if the hamiltonian is invariant under translations and reflection. Any point in the parameter space must realize a either a spontaneously symmetry broken (SSB) ground state, or a gapless ground state. Imposing the Gauss law is pivotal for the existence of the U$(1)$ symmetry, and hence of the LSM theorem. We thus demonstrate a novel mechanism to obtain an LSM-type theorem, wherein the symmetry responsible for the theorem originates from the kinematic constraints of a gauge theory. We identify a point in the parameter space at which the system is gapless. At the gapless point, the excitations admit a description in terms of free Dirac fermions with a constraint on the total fermion number. The asymptotic behavior of the two-point correlation function of the simplest local gauge-invariant quantity at the gapless point is found to be $ \propto \cos{(πr)}\,r^{-2/9}$, where $r$ is the lattice separation between the two points. This model is also a natural platform to study phase diagram topological defects residing in families of SSB phases.

AI.tldr: 本文在一维链上构建了一个$\mathbb{Z}_2 \times \mathbb{Z}_2$规范理论耦合物质系统，在Gauss law子空间中发现了U(1)对称性，并由此推导出Lieb-Schultz-Mattis (LSM)定理，排除了平凡有能隙基态的存在。系统要么自发对称性破缺，要么无能隙。研究还发现了一个自由Dirac费米子描述的无能隙点，并给出了局域规范不变量的关联函数渐近行为。
AI.motivation: 探索规范理论中的运动学约束（Gauss law）能否作为LSM型定理的新来源，即通过规范约束诱导出非平凡的对称性，从而限制基态相图。
AI.method: 在一维链上构建$\mathbb{Z}_2 \times \mathbb{Z}_2$规范理论，在Gauss law子空间中分析对称性结构（U(1)对称性及其与平移、反射算符的对易/反对易关系），推导LSM定理，并通过自由Dirac费米子映射分析无能隙点的性质。
AI.result: 证明了Gauss law子空间中存在U(1)对称性，该对称性与反射算符反对易，从而推导出LSM定理，排除了平凡有能隙基态。发现了无能隙点，可用约束自由Dirac费米子描述，局域规范不变量的两点关联函数渐近行为为$\propto \cos(πr)\,r^{-2/9}$。
AI.conclusion: 展示了一种新颖的LSM定理实现机制：对称性来源于规范理论的运动学约束（Gauss law），而非传统意义上的晶格对称性或内部对称性。该模型也为研究SSB相中的拓扑缺陷提供了自然平台。

title: Thermodynamic Geometry of two-dimensional square-well fluids
summary: Thermodynamic geometry of two-dimensional fluids has been investigated using a square-well model as a prototype fluid. A comparison with the three-dimensional case is performed in the subcritical and supercritical domains of thermodynamic space. In the subcritical region, it is found that the R-crossing method has a narrower range of validity for two-dimensional fluids compared to three-dimensional ones. On the other hand, in the supercritical region, an analysis of different Widom lines, including the R Widom line, shows that for two-dimensional fluids these lines extend further into the supercritical region than their three-dimensional counterparts. A similar behavior is observed for the validity of the Clausius--Clapeyron equation in two-dimensional fluids.

AI.tldr: 本文利用方阱模型研究二维流体的热力学几何，并与三维情况进行对比。发现在亚临界区，R-crossing方法在二维流体中的适用范围更窄；而在超临界区，二维流体的Widom线（包括R Widom线）比三维流体延伸得更远，Clausius-Clapeyron方程的适用性也有类似表现。
AI.motivation: 探究二维流体的热力学几何特性，并与三维流体进行系统比较，以揭示维度对热力学几何行为的影响。
AI.method: 采用方阱（square-well）模型作为原型流体，在亚临界和超临界两个热力学域中，对比二维与三维流体的R-crossing方法、Widom线以及Clausius-Clapeyron方程的有效性。
AI.result: 亚临界区：二维流体的R-crossing方法适用范围比三维窄；超临界区：二维流体的Widom线（含R Widom线）延伸更远；Clausius-Clapeyron方程在二维流体中的有效性也呈现类似趋势。
AI.conclusion: 维度显著影响流体的热力学几何行为，二维流体的超临界结构特征比三维更"持久"，而亚临界相变判据的适用性则更受限。

title: Structural, electronic, and optical properties of hexagonal GeSn from density functional theory
summary: Unlike cubic GeSn, which requires a high Sn concentration to undergo an indirect-to-direct bandgap transition, lonsdaleite (2H) germanium is an intrinsic direct-gap semiconductor. We employ first-principles density functional theory to investigate the structural, electronic, and optical properties of 2H-Ge$_{1-x}$Sn$_{x}$ random alloys in the dilute Sn regime ($x \le 0.10$). The extended alloy disorder is modeled using 48-atom special quasirandom structure (SQS) supercells, and the coherent effective band structure is recovered via spectral band unfolding. We show that 2H-Ge$_{1-x}$Sn$_{x}$ maintains a direct bandgap at the $Γ$ point across the studied composition range, exhibiting a strong bandgap bowing that shifts the fundamental absorption edge into the mid-infrared. Evaluation of the optical transition matrix elements reveals a giant polarization anisotropy dictated by spin-orbit coupling. The fundamental transition is strongly dipole-allowed for light polarized perpendicular to the crystal $c$-axis, an optical selection rule that is robustly preserved despite the random alloy disorder breaking the symmetry. These results demonstrate that hexagonal GeSn bypasses the compositional threshold limitations of the cubic phase, providing a highly tunable direct-gap system for infrared optoelectronics.

AI.tldr: 六方(2H)GeSn合金即使在低Sn浓度下也能保持直接带隙，展现出强带隙弯曲和中红外吸收能力，且具有巨大的偏振各向异性，克服了立方相GeSn需要高Sn浓度才能实现直接带隙的限制。
AI.motivation: 立方相GeSn需要高Sn浓度才能实现间接-直接带隙转变，而六方(2H)锗本身是直接带隙半导体，因此探索六方GeSn合金在低Sn浓度下的光电性质，以规避立方相的限制。
AI.method: 基于第一性原理密度泛函理论，使用48原子特殊准随机结构(SQS)超胞模拟合金无序，通过谱带展开恢复相干有效能带结构。
AI.result: 2H-Ge₁₋ₓSnₓ在x≤0.10范围内维持Γ点直接带隙，呈现强带隙弯曲将吸收边移至中红外；光学跃迁矩阵元显示巨大的偏振各向异性，基态跃迁在垂直于c轴方向为强偶极允许，且该选择定则不受合金无序影响。
AI.conclusion: 六方GeSn绕过了立方相需要高Sn浓度的成分阈值限制，为红外光电子学提供了一种高度可调的直接带隙体系。

title: Electron - acoustic phonons scattering in quantum wells in a tilted quantizing magnetic field
summary: Electron scattering by longitudinal acoustic phonons in a quantizing magnetic field is considered. Expressions for the scattering rate in a magnetic field tilted to the quantum well layers are derived. By analyzing these expressions, trends in the behavior of the scattering rate are established with changes in the magnetic field strength and orientation, as well as the potential profile of the quantum well.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了量子阱中电子在量化磁场下与纵向声学声子的散射，推导了倾斜磁场下的散射率表达式，并分析了磁场强度、方向及势垒形状对散射行为的影响。
AI.motivation: 理解量子阱中电子-声子散射机制，特别是在倾斜磁场下的行为，以优化基于量子阱的电子器件性能。
AI.method: 理论推导了倾斜磁场下电子与纵向声学声子散射率的解析表达式，并系统分析了磁场强度、倾斜角度及量子阱势垒轮廓等参数对散射率的影响趋势。
AI.result: 成功建立了散射率随磁场强度、倾斜角度及量子阱势垒轮廓变化的趋势关系。
AI.conclusion: 该研究为理解和调控量子阱中电子-声子散射提供了理论基础，对优化相关量子器件具有指导意义。

title: Magnesium-graphene interphase boundaries created by high-pressure torsion enhance hydrogen storage kinetics:Mechanisms and significance of activation energy and frequency factor
summary: A strategy to overcome sluggish hydrogenation/dehydrogenation of magnesium is demonstrated by creating magnesium-graphene interphase boundaries via high-pressure torsion (HPT). HPT reduces the grain size of pure magnesium from 1 mm to 850 nm, with 70% of grain boundaries having high misorientation angles. Graphene addition leads to even finer grain sizes of 10-500 nm with a bimodal morphology. The magnesium-graphene composites exhibit superior kinetics at 623 K while maintaining high air resistance. Kinetic modeling reveals that the rate-controlling mechanism transits from interfacial reaction in coarse-grained magnesium to atomic diffusion in magnesium-graphene nanocomposites. Kissinger analysis shows that the activation energy for hydrogen desorption remains unchanged at 145 +/- 2 kJ/mol, regardless of the presence of grain or interphase boundaries. However, the frequency factor (number of successful attempts to overcome the activation energy) increases with the generation of interfaces, which serve as sites for hydrogen diffusion and heterogeneous metal/hydride nucleation. These findings highlight the impact of interphase boundary engineering via severe plastic deformation for enhancing the kinetics and air resistance of hydrogen storage materials.

AI.tldr: 本文通过高压扭转（HPT）在纯镁中引入石墨烯，形成镁-石墨烯界面边界，显著细化了晶粒（从1 mm降至10-500 nm），提高了储氢动力学性能（623 K下）和空气稳定性。动力学模型显示速率控制机制从界面反应转变为原子扩散，指前因子随界面生成而增加，而活化能保持不变（145 ± 2 kJ/mol）。
AI.motivation: 克服镁在储氢过程中氢化/脱氢动力学缓慢的问题，同时提升材料的空气稳定性。
AI.method: 采用高压扭转（HPT）在纯镁中引入石墨烯，构建镁-石墨烯界面边界；通过微观结构表征、动力学建模和Kissinger分析研究其储氢性能与机制。
AI.result: HPT将镁晶粒从1 mm细化至850 nm，石墨烯添加使晶粒进一步细化至10-500 nm（双峰分布）。复合材料在623 K下展现出优异的动力学性能和空气稳定性。速率控制机制从界面反应转变为原子扩散。活化能不变（145 ± 2 kJ/mol），但指前因子随界面增加而提高。
AI.conclusion: 界面边界工程（通过剧烈塑性变形）是提升储氢材料动力学和空气稳定性的有效策略，其核心在于增加扩散和形核位点，而非降低活化能。

title: Reconfigurable chiral superconductivity
comment: 35 pages, 5 main text figures, 10 Extended Data figures, 1 Extended Data table
summary: Rhombohedral multilayer graphene at high displacement fields hosts superconductivity emerging from a spin valley polarized quarter metal, with transport signatures suggestive of time reversal symmetry (TRS) breaking and chiral superconductivity (CSC). These observations have motivated proposals of topological superconductivity and non-Abelian quasiparticles, yet direct magnetic evidence and microscopic insight into the superconducting state remain lacking, limiting understanding of this unique state. Here we use nanoscale SQUID on tip magnetometry to image isospin-polarized domains in rhombohedral pentalayer graphene and establish CSC via spatially resolved thermodynamic detection of TRS breaking. We find that the density at which domain walls proliferate at elevated temperatures coincides with the onset of CSC, indicating an underlying transition in the parent state that both induces superconductivity and reduces domain wall energy. We further show that the chiral domain structure in the superconducting phase is inherited from the isospin-polarized parent state. Strikingly, the CSC phase exhibits multiple transport regimes governed by configurations of chiral domains separated by highly resistive domain walls. We demonstrate deterministic, ultra low current control of these domains, enabling reversible switching between states of opposite chirality a defining CSC property absent in other superconductors. These results establish rhombohedral graphene as a unique platform for reconfigurable CSC and ultra low power electronic functionality based on controllable isospin textures.

AI.tldr: 本文利用纳米SQUID磁力显微镜对菱面体五层石墨烯中的超导态进行成像，直接探测到时间反演对称性破缺，建立了手性超导性。研究发现超导相的手性畴结构继承自等自旋极化母态，并展示了超低电流对畴的可逆切换控制。
AI.motivation: 先前研究表明菱面体多层石墨烯在高位移场下可能出现时间反演对称性破缺和手性超导，但缺乏直接的磁性证据和微观层面的理解，限制了对其超导态的认识。
AI.method: 使用纳米SQUID针尖磁力显微镜对菱面体五层石墨烯进行成像，通过空间分辨的热力学检测来识别等自旋极化畴并建立时间反演对称性破缺的证据。
AI.result: 发现了手性超导相中存在由高阻畴壁分隔的手性畴结构，该结构继承自等自旋极化母态；实现了确定性、超低电流的畴控制，可在相反手性态之间可逆切换。
AI.conclusion: 菱面体石墨烯是一种独特的可重构手性超导平台，基于可控等自旋纹理可实现超低功耗电子功能。

title: Thermoelectric enhancement from an asymmetric spectral-conductivity cusp in spin-1 chiral fermions
summary: A recent study showed that, in spin-1 chiral fermion systems composed of two linearly dispersing bands and one trivial band, impurity scattering produces an asymmetric cusp in the spectral conductivity. We demonstrate that this asymmetric cusp markedly enhances the electronic thermoelectric response. Using linear-response theory within the self-consistent Born approximation, we find low-temperature enhancements in both the Seebeck coefficient and the electronic figure of merit. Increasing the curvature of the trivial band further strengthens this cusp-induced enhancement, even though the corresponding density of states becomes smoother. To clarify this mechanism, we introduce a minimal cusp model for the spectral conductivity and show that the enhancement is most pronounced when the cusp is sharp and strongly asymmetric, and when the spectral conductivity at the cusp energy is small.

AI.tldr: 研究发现，在由两条线性色散带和一条平庸带组成的自旋-1手性费米子系统中，杂质散射导致谱电导出现不对称尖峰，这种尖峰能显著增强电子热电响应（塞贝克系数和热电优值），且增强效果在尖峰尖锐、不对称性强、尖峰能量处谱电导小时最为明显。
AI.motivation: 探索自旋-1手性费米子系统中杂质散射引起的不对称尖峰对热电响应的增强效应及其物理机制。
AI.method: 采用自洽玻恩近似下的线性响应理论，并引入最小尖峰模型来分析和验证谱电导的不对称尖峰对热电输运的影响。
AI.result: 发现不对称尖峰显著增强了塞贝克系数和电子热电优值；增大平庸带曲率会进一步增强尖峰诱导的增强效果；增强在尖峰尖锐、不对称性强、尖峰处谱电导小时最显著。
AI.conclusion: 谱电导的不对称尖峰是增强热电响应的关键机制，为设计高性能热电材料提供了新思路。

title: Nonlinear dynamic elastic moduli from equilibrium stress fluctuations
summary: Fluctuation formulas for elastic and viscoelastic moduli allow their computation from equilibrium molecular dynamics simulations, avoiding explicit nonequilibrium deformation protocols. While such expressions are well established for the quasi-static moduli, and also the linear dynamic moduli, no fluctuation formula exists for the nonlinear time-dependent moduli that govern anharmonic viscoelastic response under finite time-dependent strains. In this work we derive transient-time correlation function expressions for both the linear and the nonlinear dynamic moduli, starting from the DOLLS/SLLOD equations of motion for irrotational motion. The resulting formulas involve equilibrium time correlations of the stress tensor and Born-kinetic terms, and they recover the known quasi-static and linear dynamic results in the appropriate limits.

AI.tldr: 本文从DOLLS/SLLOD运动方程出发，推导了线性和非线性动态模量的瞬态时间相关函数表达式，首次建立了非线性时变粘弹性模量的涨落公式。
AI.motivation: 准静态模量和线性动态模量已有成熟的涨落公式，但缺乏非线性时间依赖模量的涨落公式，无法用平衡分子动力学模拟计算有限时间应变下的非线性粘弹性响应。
AI.method: 基于无旋运动的DOLLS/SLLOD运动方程，推导瞬态时间相关函数表达式，涉及应力张量和Born-动能项的时间关联。
AI.result: 得到了线性和非线性动态模量的涨落公式，这些公式在相应极限下能恢复已知的准静态和线性动态结果。
AI.conclusion: 建立了非线性时变粘弹性模量的涨落公式，扩展了平衡分子动力学模拟计算模量的适用范围至有限应变下的非线性区域。

title: Defect annihilation mechanism in the formation of dodecagonal quasicrystals
summary: Understanding defect evolution is essential to the structural stability of quasicrystals, yet the kinetics of defect repair remain poorly understood. Here, by combining the string method and the spring pair method, we determine the minimum energy path from defective to defect-free dodecagonal quasicrystals using a particle model with the Lennard-Jones-Gauss potential. We find that defect annihilation proceeds via three stages: phason flip, aggregation and decomposition of shield-like defects. These sequential transformations are driven by potential energy gradients and accompanied by an increase in structural symmetry. The three stages act synergistically in promoting defect annihilation, offering new insights into the microscopic repair mechanisms of quasicrystals.

AI.tldr: 本研究通过结合字符串方法和弹簧对方法，确定了从有缺陷到无缺陷的十二角准晶的最小能量路径，发现缺陷湮灭经历三个连续阶段：相子翻转、屏蔽缺陷的聚集和分解，揭示了准晶的微观修复机制。
AI.motivation: 准晶的结构稳定性依赖于缺陷演化，但缺陷修复的动力学机制至今仍不甚清楚，因此需要深入理解缺陷湮灭的微观过程。
AI.method: 采用Lennard-Jones-Gauss势的粒子模型，结合字符串方法和弹簧对方法，计算从有缺陷到无缺陷十二角准晶的最小能量路径（MEP）。
AI.result: 缺陷湮灭经历三个阶段：相子翻转、屏蔽缺陷聚集和分解；这些转变由势能梯度驱动，伴随着结构对称性的提高，三个阶段协同促进缺陷湮灭。
AI.conclusion: 该工作为准晶的微观修复机制提供了新见解，表明缺陷修复是一个由能量驱动的多阶段协同过程。

title: Lamb Shift of Landau Levels in Two-Dimensional Electron Systems in a Multimode Resonator
comment: 6 pages, 3 figures, to be published in JETP Letters
summary: The use of resonators to modify the behavior of electromagnetic systems demonstrates its potential for application in a wide range of problems. However, existing theoretical studies often resort to the single-mode approximation, rarely considering a second resonator mode. In this paper, we show that including a large number of resonator modes in the model significantly enhances the softening effect of the cyclotron frequency of a two-dimensional electron system. We address this problem by demonstrating the possibility of reducing the system to a set of coupled harmonic oscillators and finding the eigenfrequencies of the oscillators. This is made possible by applying the self-energy method for modes in one polarization and the method for finding the eigenvalues of matrices that have undergone first-rank updating for modes in the perpendicular polarization.

AI.tldr: 研究发现，在电磁系统中考虑大量谐振器模式会显著增强二维电子系统回旋频率的软化效应，通过将系统简化为耦合谐振子并应用自能方法及矩阵特征值更新技术实现。
AI.motivation: 现有理论研究多采用单模近似，很少考虑第二谐振器模式，作者希望探究多模式对系统行为的实际影响。
AI.method: 将系统简化为一组耦合谐振子，对一种极化模式应用自能方法，对垂直极化模式应用经历一阶更新的矩阵特征值求解方法。
AI.result: 包含大量谐振器模式会显著增强二维电子系统回旋频率的软化效应。
AI.conclusion: 多模式耦合不可忽略，单模近似可能低估了系统的实际物理效应。

title: Correlation-driven tunability of altermagnetism in RuO$_2$
summary: RuO$_2$ has been regarded as a prototypical candidate for metallic altermagnet, offering a potential platform for high-speed and high-efficiency spintronics. However, the magnetic ground state of RuO$_2$ remains a topic of active debate due to conflicting experimental reports. In this work, we investigate the effect of electron correlations in RuO$_2$ using density functional theory combined with dynamical mean-field theory (DFT+DMFT). In contrast to previous DFT-based studies, DFT+DMFT captures essential dynamical correlation effects, yielding spectral functions and optical conductivities in excellent quantitative agreement with experiments, and further reveals that RuO$_2$ resides in the close vicinity of both the paramagnetic-altermagnetic phase boundary and the itinerant-localized crossover, rendering the magnetic ground state highly susceptible to external perturbations. Indeed, even a minimal compressive strain of $\sim$0.5% is sufficient to drive the system into an altermagnetic phase. These findings elucidate the origin of the conflicting experimental observations and reveal that dynamical correlation effects are the key driving force behind the highly tunable magnetic ground state of RuO$_2$.

AI.tldr: 本文通过DFT+DMFT方法研究RuO₂中的电子关联效应，发现其磁性基态高度敏感于外部扰动，仅需~0.5%的压缩应变即可驱动进入交变磁相，揭示了实验争议的根源。
AI.motivation: RuO₂被认为是典型的金属交变磁体候选材料，但实验报道中其磁性基态存在激烈争议，亟需理论解释。
AI.method: 采用密度泛函理论结合动力学平均场理论（DFT+DMFT），考虑动力学关联效应，计算了谱函数和光导率。
AI.result: DFT+DMFT得到的谱函数和光导率与实验定量吻合；RuO₂处于顺磁-交变磁相边界和巡游-局域化交叉区域；仅~0.5%的压缩应变即可驱动进入交变磁相。
AI.conclusion: 动力学关联效应是RuO₂磁性基态高度可调的关键驱动力，解释了不同实验之间的矛盾结果。

title: From Film to Flakes: Electronic Properties and Magnetization Variations in Yttrium Iron Garnet
summary: Yttrium iron garnet (YIG) is a ferrimagnetic insulator valued for its high Curie temperature, very low magnetic damping, and ability to support long-range spin-wave transport. These qualities have established it as a cornerstone material in the field of spintronics and magnonics. Most studies on YIG so far have been focused on bulk crystals, thin films, and nanoparticles, including variants with substitutions at the yttrium or iron site. New morphologies such as sub-micron flakes have drawn interest recently as their geometry and mechanical flexibility might enable different device architectures. However, detailed investigations combining their electronic structure and magnetic behavior remain scarce. In this work, we present a comparative study of the electronic and magnetic properties of a bulk-like YIG film and a sub-micron-sized YIG flake. Our results highlight the distinct behavior that emerges in sub-micron dimensions and point toward future uses for flake-based YIG in compact spintronics devices.

AI.tldr: 本文比较了块状YIG薄膜和亚微米YIG薄片的电子与磁性能，发现亚微米尺度下会出现独特的物理行为，为未来紧凑型自旋电子学器件中的应用提供依据。
AI.motivation: 尽管YIG是自旋电子学和磁子学中的基石材料，但大多数研究集中在块体晶体、薄膜和纳米颗粒上。亚微米薄片由于其几何形状和机械柔韧性可能带来新的器件架构，然而对其电子结构和磁性行为的详细研究仍然缺乏。
AI.method: 对块状YIG薄膜和亚微米YIG薄片进行电子结构与磁性能的比较研究。
AI.result: 亚微米YIG薄片展现出与块状薄膜不同的独特电子与磁行为。
AI.conclusion: 亚微米尺度的YIG薄片具有区别于块状材料的独特性质，未来可用于紧凑型自旋电子学器件。

title: An Effective Scaling Framework for Non-Adiabatic Mode Dynamics
summary: This study proposes an effective theoretical framework for non-adiabatic parametric excitation in structured media, incorporating a nonlinear frequency regulator U as a stabilizing mechanism. We introduce the non-adiabaticity parameter as a time-local diagnostic for driven non-stationary systems and analyze its competition with nonlinear spectral detuning through the scaling ratio. The principal physical result is that strongly nonlinear oscillatory systems can exhibit saturation of non-adiabatic parametric amplification: when the nonlinear regulator becomes sufficiently strong, exponential mode growth is dynamically suppressed and the excitation evolves toward a bounded low-occupancy regime. Using numerical verification in an expanded 100-level bosonic Fock basis, we demonstrate a crossover from hyperbolic amplification dynamics toward an effectively bounded response associated with spectral blockade and suppression of higher-order mode occupation. These results suggest that nonlinear spectral stabilization may represent a general mechanism for finite-amplitude non-adiabatic dynamics in driven structured media.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一个非线性频率调节器U作为稳定机制，用于结构化介质中的非绝热参数激发理论框架。研究表明，强非线性振荡系统能表现出非绝热参数放大的饱和效应，当非线性调节器足够强时，指数模式增长被动态抑制，激发转向有界的低占据态。通过100级玻色子Fock基数值验证，展示了从双曲放大动力学向有效有界响应的交叉，伴随光谱阻塞和高阶模式占据的抑制。
AI.motivation: 现有理论对结构化介质中非绝热参数激发的动力学行为理解不足，特别是非线性效应如何影响和稳定非绝热放大过程尚不清楚。作者希望建立统一的理论框架，揭示非线性频率调节如何作为稳定机制来控制非绝热激发。
AI.method: 提出非绝热性参数作为时间局部诊断量，引入非线性频率调节器U，通过缩放比率分析非绝热性与非线性谱失谐之间的竞争。在扩展的100级玻色子Fock基中进行数值验证。
AI.result: 发现了强非线性振荡系统的非绝热参数放大饱和效应：足够强的非线性调节器能动态抑制指数模式增长，使激发进入有界低占据态。观察到从双曲放大动力学到有效有界响应的交叉，以及光谱阻塞和高阶模式占据的抑制。
AI.conclusion: 非线性光谱稳定化可能是驱动结构化介质中有限振幅非绝热动力学的一种通用机制，为控制非绝热激发提供了新的理论视角。

title: Multiple Softening Q-vectors Driving a Cascade of CDW Phases in $\mathrm{1T-VSe}_{2}$
summary: Charge density wave (CDW) formation in two-dimensional materials is governed by complex competing lattice instabilities that remain incompletely understood. Here, we investigate the structural evolution of monolayer $\mathrm{1T-VSe}_{2}$ using first-principles electronic and phonon calculations. The pristine phase exhibits several imaginary-frequency phonon modes associated with dominant instability wave vectors $\mathrm{Q}_{CDW}$, which generate the first-generation CDW phases. Subsequent phonon analyses reveal that several of these intermediate structures remain dynamically unstable and undergo further symmetry-lowering distortions into larger superstructures. Through iterative phonon-driven relaxations, we identify multiple transformation pathways that converge toward the same low-energy $2\sqrt{3}\times4$ CDW configuration. Although these pathways originate from distinct intermediate CDW states, they ultimately reach nearly degenerate energetically stable phases, demonstrating that different phonon-driven routes can lead to the same ground-state configuration. The results establish a unified phonon-driven cascade mechanism for hierarchical CDW formation in monolayer $\mathrm{1T-VSe}_{2}$ and provide a systematic framework for understanding competing ordered phases in low-dimensional quantum materials.

AI.tldr: 本文通过第一性原理计算揭示了单层1T-VSe₂中电荷密度波（CDW）形成的层级演化机制：初始结构存在多个虚频声子模式，驱动形成第一代CDW相；这些中间相仍不稳定，进一步经历对称性破缺，最终通过不同的声子驱动路径收敛到相同的2√3×4低能CDW基态构型。
AI.motivation: 二维材料中CDW的形成受复杂竞争的晶格不稳定性支配，目前对其理解尚不完全，需要系统揭示CDW相的层级形成机制和演化路径。
AI.method: 采用第一性原理电子和声子计算方法，通过迭代声子驱动结构弛豫，分析单层1T-VSe₂的声子色散、虚频模式及结构演化路径。
AI.result: 1) 原始相存在多个虚频声子模式，对应主导不稳定性波矢Q_CDW，生成第一代CDW相；2) 部分中间结构仍动态不稳定，继续发生对称性降低的畸变形成更大超结构；3) 多条不同起始路径最终收敛到几乎简并的2√3×4 CDW基态构型。
AI.conclusion: 建立了单层1T-VSe₂中层级CDW形成的统一声子驱动级联机制，为理解低维量子材料中竞争有序相提供了系统框架。

title: Probing Floquet topological phases via non-Hermitian skin effect of reflected waves
summary: Periodically driven systems host topological phases without static analogs, such as the anomalous Floquet phase characterized by trivial bulk bands yet robust boundary modes. In this work, we investigate the scattering problem of a Floquet Chern insulator and reveal the non-Hermitian skin effect (NHSE) of reflected waves. Using a discrete-time scattering formalism, we demonstrate how the non-Hermitian winding number of the reflection matrix is linked to the bulk Floquet invariant via boundary resonances. This reflected-wave NHSE relies on which quasienergy gap the incident wave resides in, leading to a gap-dependent Goos-Hänchen (GH) shift. We further show that the momentum-integrated GH shift quantitatively yields the Floquet topological invariant of the corresponding gap. Our work highlights a frequency-dependent NHSE of reflected waves in driven systems and provides a real-space scattering approach to identify non-equilibrium topology.

AI.tldr: 本文研究Floquet陈绝缘体的散射问题，发现反射波存在非厄米趋肤效应，其与体态拓扑不变量通过边界共振相联系，并可通过Goos-Hänchen位移定量提取Floquet拓扑不变量。
AI.motivation: 周期性驱动系统存在无静态类比的新型拓扑相（如反常Floquet相），但其拓扑性质的探测手段有限。本文旨在通过散射方法揭示反射波中的非厄米趋肤效应，并建立其与Floquet拓扑不变量的定量联系。
AI.method: 采用离散时间散射形式，分析Floquet陈绝缘体的散射问题；计算反射矩阵的非厄米绕数，建立其与体态Floquet不变量的关联；推导动量积分后的Goos-Hänchen位移与拓扑不变量的定量关系。
AI.result: 发现反射波存在依赖准能隙的非厄米趋肤效应；反射波的Goos-Hänchen位移具有能隙依赖特性；动量积分的GH位移可定量提取对应能隙的Floquet拓扑不变量。
AI.conclusion: 该工作揭示了驱动系统中反射波的频率依赖非厄米趋肤效应，提供了一种通过实空间散射方法识别非平衡拓扑相的新途径。

title: High-temperature behavior of amorphous alumina coatings: Insights from in-situ nanoindentation and X-ray diffraction studies
summary: Further development of nuclear power plant technology relies heavily on materials durability under operating conditions. Estimating the materials performance in the operando tests is crucial. In this paper, the mechanical behavior of thin amorphous nuclear-dedicated Al2O3 coatings deposited by pulsed laser deposition was investigated by nanoindentation over the temperature range of 25-650C. Experimental nanomechanical analysis was supported by MD simulations. The results indicate that the hardness of the amorphous coating experiences a gradual, constant decrease with temperature, while the Young modulus value remains constant in the whole temperature range. Observed phenomena confirm the increasing plasticity of the material and it is postulated to be related to the bond-switching mechanism that accelerates at high temperatures. The post-mortem transmission electron microscopy characterization confirmed that the loaded material was non-crystalline over the entire range of the indentation temperatures. The thermal stability of the structure was further studied in-situ up to 1050C by X-ray diffraction. The implemented methodology allowed us to follow the dynamic process of phase transitions occurring in the material above 650C. First, thermally activated crystallization was observed at 700C. Intermediate alumina phases were present up to 950C, while above this temperature, exclusively the thermodynamically stable alpha-Al2O3 was observed. The in-situ high-temperature characterization of the evolution of thin films boosts the understanding of the application limits of the coating systems at elevated temperatures. The added value is that the paper demonstrates the potential usefulness of combining high-temperature techniques to characterize the complete behavior of thin films at elevated temperatures.

AI.tldr: 本研究通过纳米压痕实验和分子动力学模拟，系统研究了脉冲激光沉积制备的非晶Al2O3涂层在25-650°C范围内的力学行为，发现硬度随温度逐渐下降而杨氏模量保持恒定，并通过原位XRD揭示了650°C以上的相变过程（700°C结晶，最终950°C以上转变为稳定的α-Al2O3）。
AI.motivation: 核电技术的发展依赖于材料在运行条件下的耐久性，而评估材料在工况下的性能至关重要。本文旨在通过高温力学测试与模拟相结合的方法，系统表征非晶Al2O3涂层在宽温度范围内的力学行为和相稳定性，以明确其应用极限。
AI.method: 采用脉冲激光沉积法制备非晶Al2O3涂层；通过25-650°C范围内的纳米压痕实验测量硬度和杨氏模量；结合分子动力学模拟支持实验结果；利用透射电子显微镜进行后分析确认非晶结构；通过原位X射线衍射（最高1050°C）研究高温相变过程。
AI.result: 硬度随温度升高逐渐线性下降，杨氏模量在整个温度范围内保持恒定；材料塑性随温度增加，与高温下加速的键切换机制相关；700°C开始结晶，中间氧化铝相存在于700-950°C，950°C以上完全转变为热力学稳定的α-Al2O3。
AI.conclusion: 本文展示了结合多种高温表征技术（纳米压痕、MD模拟、原位XRD、TEM）全面评估薄膜在高温下力学行为与相稳定性的有效方法论，增进了对非晶Al2O3涂层在高温下应用极限的理解。

title: Cryogenic microwave frequency combs based on quantum paraelectric superconducting resonators
summary: A frequency comb, known for its precision as an "optical ruler", features an evenly spaced spectral pattern. While these combs are vital in photonic quantum technologies, their microwave counterparts are now highly sought after for cryogenic quantum technologies, including semiconducting and superconducting qubits and quantum electrical metrology, which mainly operate in the microwave regime. However, microwave combs are still largely underexplored, and typically rely on complex, high-power optical systems incompatible with the low-power, cryogenic on-chip quantum technologies. In this manuscript, we present an all-electrical, on-chip, cryogenic microwave frequency comb on Strontium Titanate (SrTiO$_3$), exploiting its Pockels-like effect in its quantum paraelectric phase. Our device, utilizing a superconducting microwave cavity, generating the frequency comb via cavity phase modulation enabled by the field-induced effective $χ(2)$ of SrTiO$_3$. The ability to continuously vary the dielectric constant of SrTiO$_3$ by the application of electric field, in its quantum paraelectric phase, makes it possible to control the comb's operating frequency range. The exceptionally high dielectric constant of SrTiO$_3$, > 20,000 in its quantum paraelectric state, enables an ultra-miniature design and on-chip integration with cryogenic quantum technologies.

AI.tldr: 本文展示了一种基于钛酸锶(SrTiO₃)量子顺电相的全电、片上、低温微波频率梳，利用其类Pockels效应实现腔相位调制，从而产生频率梳，解决了传统微波频率梳依赖复杂高功率光学系统、难以与低温量子技术集成的难题。
AI.motivation: 微波频率梳对低温量子技术（如超导量子比特、半导体量子比特、量子电学计量）至关重要，但现有微波频率梳技术复杂、依赖高功率光学系统，无法与低功耗、低温片上量子技术兼容，因此亟需开发一种集成的、低功耗的片上微波频率梳方案。
AI.method: 利用SrTiO₃在量子顺电相中的场致有效χ(2)非线性效应（类Pockels效应），结合超导微波腔，通过腔相位调制产生频率梳。通过外加电场连续调控SrTiO₃的超高介电常数（>20,000），实现频率梳工作频率范围的可调谐性。
AI.result: 成功实现了全电气驱动、片上集成、低温工作的微波频率梳，且由于SrTiO₃的超高介电常数，器件设计极为紧凑，具备与低温量子技术片上集成的能力。
AI.conclusion: 该工作为低温量子技术提供了首个全电、片上集成的微波频率梳方案，有望推动超导量子计算、量子计量等领域的发展，展示了SrTiO₃在量子技术中的巨大潜力。

title: Enhanced Near-Field Thermal Radiation Driven by Multiple Corner and Edge Modes in Subwavelength Square Nanowires
summary: We demonstrate that the near-field thermal radiation between subwavelength SiC nanowires with square cross sections is dominated by multiple corner and edge resonances rather than the single surface-phonon-polariton channel of planar surfaces. Fluctuational electrodynamics simulations reveal that these resonances lie within the SiC Reststrahlen band, redshift for thinner nanowires, and yield a four-fold enhancement of thermal conductance. This maximum enhancement occurs when the separation gap nearly matches the nanowire thickness, balancing dimensional confinement and interwire coupling. These findings establish square nanowires as a versatile platform for geometrycontrolled near-field heat transfer in nanoscale heat management and energy conversion.

AI.tldr: 本文发现，具有方形截面的亚波长SiC纳米线之间的近场热辐射主要由多重角部和边缘共振主导，而非传统平面表面的单一声子极化激元通道。模拟表明这些共振位于SiC Reststrahlen带内，随纳米线变薄红移，并在间距接近纳米线厚度时实现四倍热导增强。
AI.motivation: 探索亚波长方形截面纳米线中几何结构（角部与边缘）对近场热辐射的调控作用，突破传统平面结构单一通道的限制。
AI.method: 采用波动电动力学模拟，分析方形截面SiC纳米线之间的近场热辐射特性。
AI.result: 发现了多重角部和边缘共振模式，共振频率随纳米线变薄红移；当分离间隙与纳米线厚度匹配时，热导增强达四倍。
AI.conclusion: 方形纳米线为几何控制的近场热传输提供了多功能平台，有望用于纳米尺度热管理和能量转换。

title: Anisotropic Dopant and Strain Architectures in WS$_2$ Nanocrystals Driven by Growth Kinetics
summary: Dopant distribution in two-dimensional semiconductors is typically assumed to be stochastic, limiting deterministic defect engineering. Here, we show that non-equilibrium growth kinetics can be harnessed to define dopant-driven strain architectures in vanadium-doped WS$_2$ monolayers. Using synchrotron X-ray fluorescence, we identify preferential vanadium incorporation, anti-correlated with tungsten content, along crystallographic bisectors. An adsorption-growth-diffusion model with a single kinetic parameter quantitatively captures the dopant segregation arising from preferential corner adsorption and limited diffusion during chemical vapor deposition growth. Hyperspectral Raman imaging demonstrates mechanically induced vibrational responses, revealing localized tensile strain ($\varepsilon \approx0.70\%$) channels associated with the anisotropic dopant distribution. This regime is marked by the depletion of W-site-sensitive in-plane modes and the emergence of a localized $J2$ mode (210~cm$^{-1}$), which our ab-initio calculations attribute to antiphase V$-$V oscillations. These findings establish kinetic segregation as a route to deterministic chemical and strain architectures in 2D semiconductors, enabling programmable defect landscapes and strain engineering during synthesis.

AI.tldr: 本文发现，在V掺杂的WS₂单层中，通过控制非平衡生长动力学（化学气相沉积），可以实现掺杂剂的非随机分布——V原子优先沿晶体角平分线分布，形成各向异性的应变通道（约0.70%拉应变），并产生反相V-V振荡的J2模式（210 cm⁻¹）。这为二维半导体中确定性缺陷工程和应变工程提供了新路径。
AI.motivation: 传统观点认为二维半导体中掺杂剂分布是随机的，这限制了确定性的缺陷工程。作者希望打破这一假设，探索利用非平衡生长动力学来调控掺杂剂空间分布的可能性。
AI.method: ① 通过化学气相沉积（CVD）生长V掺杂WS₂单层；② 使用同步辐射X射线荧光（XRF）表征掺杂剂分布；③ 建立吸附-生长-扩散模型（单一动力学参数）定量描述掺杂偏析；④ 利用高光谱拉曼成像探测力学诱导的振动响应；⑤ 结合第一性原理计算（ab-initio）解释拉曼模式的起源。
AI.result: ① V优先沿晶体角平分线掺入，与W含量呈反相关；② 模型成功捕捉到由角吸附偏好和有限扩散导致的掺杂偏析；③ 发现了约0.70%的局部拉应变通道；④ 出现了W位点敏感的平面内模式耗尽，以及归因于反相V-V振荡的J2模式（210 cm⁻¹）。
AI.conclusion: 动力学偏析可作为二维半导体中确定性化学和应变结构的设计途径，实现了合成过程中可编程的缺陷景观和应变工程。

title: Shubnikov-de Haas Characterization of Superconductor-Semiconductor Heterostructures
summary: Hybrid superconductor-semiconductor nanostructures are a central component for research spanning condensed matter physics and quantum information processing. Continued progress relies critically on the ability to characterize, control, and optimize several intrinsic material properties including spin-orbit coupling, band offsets, and disorder in a device-relevant stack that necessarily couples the electronic states of a superconducting metal film and a semiconductor. Here we report a new method to extract fundamental material parameters utilizing simple Shubnikov-de Haas (SdH) oscillation measurements in heterostructures in which metallic electronic states are coupled to a two-dimensional electron gas (2DEG) residing in an InAs quantum well beneath an aluminum thin film. Proper analysis of the full magnetoresistance data facilitates extraction of the quantum well carrier density, spin-orbit coupling strength, and both transport and quantum scattering times. Most importantly, the extracted scattering times in the 2DEG are impacted by the metal-semiconductor coupling strength allowing us to quickly gain information on proximity-induced superconducting gap without any fabrication or mK measurements. The wealth of information that is accessed with these simple measurements positions this methodology as an important tool for hybrid materials optimization.

AI.tldr: 本文报道了一种利用Shubnikov-de Haas (SdH)振荡测量方法，从超导-半导体异质结构中提取关键材料参数（载流子密度、自旋-轨道耦合强度、散射时间等）的新方法，并可通过金属-半导体耦合强度快速获取邻近诱导超导能隙信息，无需复杂器件制备或mK级测量。
AI.motivation: 混合超导-半导体纳米结构在凝聚态物理和量子信息处理中至关重要，但需要能够表征、控制和优化自旋-轨道耦合、能带偏移、无序等本征材料特性。现有方法复杂且耗时，亟需一种简便有效的表征手段。
AI.method: 利用InAs量子阱/铝薄膜异质结构中的SdH振荡测量，通过对完整磁阻数据的分析，提取量子阱载流子密度、自旋-轨道耦合强度、输运散射时间和量子散射时间，并利用金属-半导体耦合强度与2DEG散射时间的关系间接获取邻近超导能隙信息。
AI.result: 成功从简单SdH测量中提取了量子阱载流子密度、自旋-轨道耦合强度、输运和量子散射时间等关键参数；发现2DEG中的散射时间受金属-半导体耦合强度影响，可间接获取邻近超导能隙信息。
AI.conclusion: 该方法无需复杂器件制备或mK级低温测量即可获得丰富的材料信息，可作为混合材料优化的有力工具，对推动超导-半导体混合体系研究具有重要意义。

title: Magnetocaloric Effect in Nanostructured $La_{0.6}Sr_{0.4}Fe_{1-x}Co_{x}O_3$
summary: This work presents a systematic study of the magnetocaloric effect in the nanostructured perovskite series $La_{0.6}Sr_{0.4}Fe_{1-x}Co_{x}O_3$ (x = 0, 0.2, 0.5, 0.8, and 1.0), synthesized by a pore-wetting method using polymeric membranes with pore diameters of 200 nm and 800 nm. All samples were calcined at 1000°C. Structural characterization was made by X-ray diffraction and confirmed the formation of a single-phase perovskite with distorted rhombohedral symmetry, without detectable secondary phases. We observed significant influence of substitution of Fe by Co on the morphology, as the analysis by scanning electron microscopy revealed a clear evolution from smaller to larger particles and from thin to thicker nanotubes, as the Co content increased. Magnetic measurements showed that the cationic substitution enhances ferromagnetic coupling, increasing both the saturation magnetization (MS) and the Curie temperature (TC). The magnetocaloric properties, determined through the Maxwell relations, exhibit a maximum entropy change of 1.13 J/(kg K) under an applied field of 3 T for the sample with x = 1. These results demonstrate that the combination of Co doping and controlled nanostructuring effectively optimizes the magnetocaloric response.

AI.tldr: 本文系统研究了通过孔径200 nm和800 nm聚合物膜润湿法合成的纳米结构钙钛矿系列La₀.₆Sr₀.₄Fe₁₋ₓCoₓO₃（x=0, 0.2, 0.5, 0.8, 1.0）的磁热效应。Co替代Fe增强了铁磁耦合，提高了饱和磁化强度和居里温度，在x=1和3 T磁场下获得最大熵变1.13 J/(kg K)，表明Co掺杂与纳米结构调控可有效优化磁热响应。
AI.motivation: 探索通过Co掺杂和纳米结构调控来优化钙钛矿材料的磁热效应，为磁制冷等应用寻找性能更优的材料体系。
AI.method: 采用孔径200 nm和800 nm聚合物膜润湿法合成La₀.₆Sr₀.₄Fe₁₋ₓCoₓO₃纳米管，1000°C煅烧；通过XRD、SEM进行结构形貌表征，利用Maxwell关系从磁测量数据计算磁热效应。
AI.result: XRD确认单相畸变菱方钙钛矿结构；SEM显示随Co含量增加，颗粒尺寸增大、纳米管变厚；Co替代增强铁磁耦合，提高饱和磁化强度和居里温度；x=1样品在3 T下最大熵变1.13 J/(kg K)。
AI.conclusion: Co掺杂与纳米结构调控相结合能有效优化La₀.₆Sr₀.₄Fe₁₋ₓCoₓO₃体系的磁热响应，在磁制冷领域具有应用潜力。

title: Magnetization-dependent and stacking-tunable Edelstein effect in two-dimensional magnet 2H-VTe2
summary: The Edelstein effect in magnetic systems enables magnetization switching via the coupling between current-induced spin accumulation and intrinsic magnetic order, and is therefore highly promising for next-generation spintronic devices. Realizing and manipulating the Edelstein effect in two-dimensional (2D) magnetic systems is particularly desirable for achieving high-efficiency and multifunctional spintronic applications. In this work, based on first-principles calculations and symmetry analysis, we demonstrate that the Edelstein effect can intrinsically arise in the 2D in-plane ferromagnetic semiconductor 2H-VTe2, with its behavior strongly dependent on the magnetization orientation. For monolayer 2H-VTe2 with D3h crystal symmetry, under an applied current along the +x direction, only the time-reversal-even z component and the time-reversal-odd y(x) component of the spin accumulation are allowed when the magnetization is aligned along +x (+y). For ferromagnetic bilayer 2H-VTe2 in AB or BA stacking, where the crystal symmetry is reduced to C3v, additional spin components emerge with the presence of in-plane magnetization. Specifically, for magnetization along +x (+y), besides dSz_even and dSy_odd (dSz_even and dSx_odd), extra components such as dSy_even and dSz_odd (dSy_even) become allowed. Notably, these additional components can be reversibly switched by changing the stacking configuration from AB to BA via interlayer sliding. Our results not only deepen the understanding of current-induced spin accumulation in 2D magnetic systems from both symmetry and first-principles perspectives, but also identify 2H-MX2 materials as a promising platform for realizing intrinsic and tunable Edelstein effects in high-efficiency spin-orbit torque devices.

AI.tldr: 基于第一性原理计算和对称性分析，本文证明2D面内铁磁半导体2H-VTe2中可固有存在Edelstein效应，其行为强烈依赖于磁化取向和层间堆叠方式，可通过层间滑动可逆切换自旋积累分量，为高效自旋轨道转矩器件提供了新平台。
AI.motivation: 在二维磁性系统中实现并调控Edelstein效应，对于开发高效、多功能的自旋电子学器件具有重要意义，但目前相关研究尚不充分。
AI.method: 采用第一性原理计算与对称性分析相结合的方法，研究2H-VTe2单层和双层（AB/BA堆叠）中的电流诱导自旋积累行为。
AI.result: 1) 单层D3h对称下，磁化沿+x（+y）时仅允许dSz_even和dSy_odd（dSz_even和dSx_odd）；2) 双层C3v对称下出现额外自旋分量（如dSy_even、dSz_odd等）；3) 通过AB→BA层间滑动可逆切换这些额外分量。
AI.conclusion: 研究不仅深化了对2D磁系统中电流诱导自旋积累的理解，还指出2H-MX2材料是实现固有且可调Edelstein效应的理想平台，可用于高效自旋轨道转矩器件。

title: OpenAaaS: An Open Agent-as-a-Service Framework for Distributed Materials-Informatics Research
summary: The Materials Genome Initiative catalyzed the proliferation of centralized platforms--SaaS, PaaS, and IaaS--that aggregate computational and experimental resources for accelerated materials discovery. In parallel, breakthroughs in large language models (LLMs) and autonomous agents have created powerful new reasoning capabilities for scientific research. Yet a critical "last mile" problem remains: while we possess world-class models and vast repositories of materials data, we lack the organizational infrastructure to compose these capabilities securely across institutional boundaries. The development of structural and functional materials for harsh service environments--high-temperature alloys, radiation resistant steels, corrosion-resistant coatings--remains characterized by long-term iteration, mechanistic complexity, and high domain expertise--demands that exceed both monolithic agent systems and traditional centralized platforms. To address this gap we propose OpenAaaS, an open-source hierarchical and distributed Agent-as-a-Service framework that enables organized multi-agent collaboration for intelligent materials design. OpenAaaS is built on a single foundational principle: code flows, data stays still. A Master Agent plans and decomposes complex research tasks without requiring direct access to subordinate agents' managed data and computational resources. Sub-agents, deployed as near-data execution nodes, retain full sovereignty over local datasets, proprietary algorithms, and specialized hardware. This architecture guarantees that raw data never leaves its domain of origin while enabling cross-scale, cross-domain secure integration of previously isolated materials intelligence silos. We validate the framework through two representative case studies: (i) AlphaAgent, an evidence-grounded materials literature analysis executor that achieves 4.66/5.0 on deep analytical questions against single-pass RAG baselines; and (ii) an ultra-large-scale hexa-high-entropy alloy descriptor database service that demonstrates secure near-data execution and domain-specific scientific workflows under strict data-sovereignty constraints. OpenAaaS establishes a principled pathway toward "organized research" via agent collectives, offering a scalable foundation for next-generation materials intelligent design platforms. All source code is available at https://github.com/Wolido/OpenAaaS.

AI.tldr: 提出OpenAaaS，一个开源的分层分布式Agent-as-a-Service框架，通过"代码流动、数据静止"原则实现跨机构边界的多智能体安全协作，以解决材料科学中"最后一公里"的组织基础设施问题。
AI.motivation: 尽管已有先进的LLM、自主智能体以及SaaS/PaaS/IaaS等材料数据平台，但缺乏跨机构边界的组织基础设施来安全整合这些能力；严苛服役环境下的材料研发（高温合金、抗辐照钢等）需要长期迭代、机理复杂且高度依赖领域专长，超出了单体智能体系统和传统集中式平台的能力。
AI.method: 提出OpenAaaS框架，核心原则为"代码流动、数据静止"（Code flows, data stays still）。Master Agent负责规划与分解复杂研究任务，但不直接访问子智能体的数据和计算资源；Sub-agents作为近数据执行节点，保留对本地数据集、专有算法和专用硬件的完全主权，确保原始数据不离开其域。
AI.result: 通过两个案例验证：(i) AlphaAgent文献分析工具在深度分析问题上得分4.66/5.0，优于单次RAG基线；(ii) 超大规模六元高熵合金描述符数据库服务在严格数据主权约束下实现安全近数据执行和领域科学工作流。
AI.conclusion: OpenAaaS通过智能体集体"有组织的研究"范式，为下一代材料智能设计平台提供了可扩展的基础，建立了跨领域、跨尺度安全整合孤立材料智能的可行路径。

title: Layer thickness dependent band gap of MBE grown single- to few-layer MoS$_{2}$
summary: In light of the rise of transition metal dichalcogenides as 2D semiconductors for device applications, band engineering becomes very important from an application point of view. In many of these materials, such as the canonical example of MoS$_{2}$, the semiconductor band gap depends on the layer number. It changes from indirect to direct as it evolves from a bulk semiconductor to a monolayer. Interestingly, it was predicted and experimentally confirmed that, by thinning the material from bulk to a bilayer, the indirect transition shows a strong blue-shift. Here, we present the results of scanning tunnelling spectroscopy measurements on MoS$_{2}$ that has been grown \textit{in situ} via molecular beam epitaxy on graphene on Ir(111) at thicknesses ranging from 1 to 5 layers. We find a drastic decrease of the band gap with increasing layer number, to values even below the band gap in bulk. We also observe that the pinning of the conduction band vanishes above 4 layers. Comparing our experimental data with density functional theory and \textit{GW} calculations indicates that an additional screening is introduced by the sample growth conditions.

AI.tldr: 本文通过扫描隧道谱测量研究了分子束外延生长在石墨烯/Ir(111)上的1-5层MoS₂，发现随着层数增加带隙急剧减小至低于体材料带隙，且4层以上导带钉扎消失，结合DFT和GW计算表明样品生长条件引入了额外屏蔽效应。
AI.motivation: 过渡金属二硫族化物作为2D半导体在器件应用中，能带工程至关重要。MoS₂等材料的带隙随层数变化（体材料间接带隙→单层直接带隙），且减薄至双层时间接跃迁出现强蓝移。已有预测和实验确认了这一现象，但此前缺乏对超薄层（1-5层）精确的局域带隙测量及其与理论对比的系统研究。
AI.method: 采用分子束外延（MBE）在石墨烯/Ir(111)衬底上原位生长1-5层MoS₂，利用扫描隧道谱（STS）测量不同层数样品的带隙，并结合密度泛函理论（DFT）和GW方法进行理论计算对比。
AI.result: 发现带隙随层数增加而急剧减小，甚至低于体材料带隙；导带钉扎效应在4层以上消失；实验结果与DFT/GW计算存在差异，表明生长条件引入了额外屏蔽效应。
AI.conclusion: MoS₂超薄层的带隙随层数变化并非简单单调变化，MBE生长条件带来的额外屏蔽效应显著影响电子结构，这对基于TMDs的器件设计具有重要指导意义。

title: High-Pressure XRD Study of Ti-3Al-2.5V Titanium Alloy: Intermediate Transition Pressure and Composition Trends in Ti-Al-V Alloys
summary: High-pressure X-ray diffraction experiments were performed on Ti-Al-V alloys to investigate the effect of composition on structural stability, focusing on Ti-3Al-2.5V and comparing with pure Titanium and Ti-6Al-4V. Measurements using different pressure-transmitting media show a phase transition in Ti-3Al-2.5V at 17-19 GPa, intermediate between pure Ti (5-10 GPa) and Ti-6Al-4V (~30 GPa). Despite variations arising from the choice of pressure medium, the transition pressure shows a clear and systematic increase with higher Al and V content. Equation-of-state analysis indicates that the bulk modulus remains nearly unchanged across compositions. This suggests a decoupling between elastic properties and phase stability, with alloying primarily affecting the transition pressure rather than compressibility. These results highlight the role of composition in tuning high-pressure phase transformations in Ti-Al-V based alloys.

AI.tldr: 通过高压X射线衍射实验，研究了Ti-Al-V合金中成分对结构稳定性的影响，发现随着Al和V含量增加，相变压力从纯Ti的5-10 GPa升高到Ti-3Al-2.5V的17-19 GPa，再到Ti-6Al-4V的约30 GPa，但体弹模量几乎不变，表明弹性性质与相稳定性之间存在解耦。
AI.motivation: 探究Ti-Al-V合金中成分变化对高压下结构稳定性的影响，特别是相变压力随Al和V含量的变化规律。
AI.method: 对Ti-3Al-2.5V合金进行高压X射线衍射实验，使用不同压力传递介质，并与纯Ti和Ti-6Al-4V的结果进行比较。
AI.result: Ti-3Al-2.5V的相变压力为17-19 GPa，介于纯Ti（5-10 GPa）和Ti-6Al-4V（约30 GPa）之间；相变压力随Al和V含量增加而系统性地升高；体弹模量在不同成分间几乎不变。
AI.conclusion: 合金化主要影响相变压力而非压缩性，弹性性质与相稳定性之间存在解耦，成分可有效调控Ti-Al-V合金的高压相变行为。

title: Giant optical spin-orbit interactions in ferroelectric van der Waals waveguides
summary: Optical spin-orbit interactions (SOI) link photonic spin to momentum, offering a route toward on-chip polarization control and beam steering. Nevertheless, achieving sufficient optical SOI and nonlinearities on sub-micrometer scales - a prerequisite for dense photonic integration - remains an outstanding challenge. Here, we show that highly birefringent van der Waals (vdW) waveguides provide an ideal, chip-compatible platform to address this limitation. We focus on the ferroelectric semiconductor NbOI2, which exhibits record optical nonlinearities and dielectric anisotropy. Using femtosecond optical microscopy, we image light propagation and harmonic conversion beyond the total internal reflection barrier over tens of micrometers in NbOI2 slab waveguides. We report giant optical spin-splitting through the optical spin Hall effect, which facilitates spatial separation of optical spin currents on sub-micrometer scales, in quantitative agreement with a microscopic light-matter interaction model. We further leverage optical spin-momentum locking to realize polarization-controlled waveguide steering. We generalize these observations across various vdW waveguides and empirically confirm a scaling law linking dielectric anisotropy to geometric spin-splitting. Our results establish highly anisotropic vdW waveguides as an ideal platform for densely integrated opto-spintronic technologies.

AI.tldr: 本文展示了具有强双折射的范德华波导NbOI₂能够实现亚微米尺度的光学自旋-轨道相互作用，包括巨光学自旋霍尔效应和偏振控制波导转向，为密集光自旋集成技术提供了理想平台。
AI.motivation: 在亚微米尺度上实现足够强的光学自旋-轨道相互作用和非线性效应是密集光子集成的关键挑战，现有平台难以满足这一需求。
AI.method: 利用高双折射范德华铁电半导体NbOI₂（具有创纪录的光学非线性和介电各向异性），通过飞秒光学显微镜成像光传播和谐波转换，结合微观光-物质相互作用模型进行定量分析。
AI.result: 在NbOI₂平板波导中观察到巨光学自旋分裂（光学自旋霍尔效应），实现亚微米尺度的光学自旋电流空间分离；利用自旋-动量锁定实现偏振控制波导转向；并在多种范德华波导中验证了介电各向异性与几何自旋分裂之间的标度律。
AI.conclusion: 高各向异性范德华波导是密集集成光自旋电子技术的理想平台，有望推动片上偏振控制和光束操控的发展。

title: Chiral molecule-induced contributions to ferromagnetic resonance
summary: Despite extensive research on chirality-driven spin selectivity, most studies have focused on static magnetic properties, while the influence of chirality on the dynamic magnetic response remains largely unexplored. Here, we investigate how chiral molecular interfaces affect magnetization dynamics in thin Co/Ni multilayers with perpendicular magnetic anisotropy using broadband ferromagnetic resonance spectroscopy. A comparison between bare (reference) films and molecule-functionalized (hybrid) samples reveals no measurable changes in either the resonance field or the linewidth that could be attributed to the presence of the chiral environment. Motivated by our findings we develop a macrospin description that distinguishes equilibrium modifications of the magnetic free-energy landscape (MIPAC-type effects) from non-equilibrium, CISS-induced spin torques. Our analysis shows that equilibrium modifications primarily shift the resonance condition via changes to the free energy landscape and thereby the effective field, whereas damping-like non-equilibrium torques provide a distinct channel for varying the effective damping rate. This approach establishes clear criteria for disentangling chiral-interface-induced energy modifications from torque-driven dynamical effects in ferromagnetic resonance experiments.

AI.tldr: 本文通过宽带铁磁共振谱研究手性分子界面如何影响Co/Ni多层膜的磁化动力学，发现手性环境未引起共振场或线宽的可测量变化，并提出了区分平衡态自由能修改与非平衡态自旋扭矩的宏观自旋描述方法。
AI.motivation: 现有手性诱导自旋选择性研究大多集中在静态磁性质，对手性如何影响动态磁响应的探索仍然不足，因此作者希望填补这一空白。
AI.method: 采用宽带铁磁共振光谱学，对比裸薄膜（参考）与分子功能化（混合）样品，并发展宏观自旋模型区分平衡态（MIPAC型）与非平衡态（CISS诱导自旋扭矩）效应。
AI.result: 手性分子界面未引起共振场或线宽的可测量变化；平衡态修改主要影响共振条件，而非平衡态阻尼类扭矩提供改变有效阻尼率的独立通道。
AI.conclusion: 建立了在铁磁共振实验中区分手性界面诱导的能量修改与扭矩驱动动力学效应的明确标准。
